article_title: 代码只是软件工作的很小一部分
core_theme: 软件工程师的长期价值来自调试、判断、计划、测试、沟通和记录，而不只是写更多代码。
reader_takeaway: 读者能理解 AI 时代代码生成变便宜后，哪些能力更值得投入。
summary_angle: 把“写代码”放成小块，把调试、计划、测试和决策记录放成真正撑起工程工作的四个支柱。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文标题 Code was the smallest part of the job，以及开头提到职业里大部分工作不在 coding。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧是一小块代码纸片，旁边有更大的工程工作台。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文第 1 条 The job is mostly debugging，强调日志、stack traces、profilers、git bisect。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中间主焦点是工程师用放大镜检查日志和系统线路。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文第 4 条 Plan before you code 和第 6 条 Tests are a contract with future-you。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右上角是一张计划纸和测试勾选卡。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文第 10 条 Write things down，建议每个项目保留 decisions/ 文件夹。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右下角是 decisions 文件夹，保存工程决策。

main_metaphor: 代码只是工作台上的一张小纸，真正支撑系统的是调试工具、计划、测试和决策记录。
subject_action: 工程师把小代码片段放到一边，正在排查日志、整理计划和保存决策。
composition: 左右对照，中心主物体，四个信息块围绕主工作台
comic_style_reason: 这篇文章是工程经验判断，主线是对“只看写代码”的观念做对照，适合用美漫式编辑感和强对比。
draft_goal: 第一轮验证小代码块和大工程工作台的对照是否清楚。
revision_targets: 避免画成普通程序员海报
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: code is only a small part of long-term software engineering work. The reader should quickly feel that debugging, planning, testing, people skills, and decision records carry more long-term value than typing more code.

Summary angle: make the code fragment visibly small, while the engineering workbench is larger and supported by debugging, planning, tests, and records.
Narrative flow: conflict-to-resolution. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 4 supporting narrative beats.
Information blocks:
- contrast: code is a small part of the job, visible label "少写"
- mechanism: debugging takes most of the real work, visible label "调试"
- step: planning before coding reduces rework, visible label "计划"
- takeaway: decisions need to be written down, visible label "记录"

Main metaphor: code is a small paper slip on a large engineering workbench, while tools for debugging, planning, testing, and decision records hold the system together.
Subject: an engineering workbench with a tiny code note, a magnifying glass over logs, a planning sheet, a test checklist, and a decisions folder.
Composition/framing: editorial contrast composition with one central workbench and four readable supporting beats. Prefer a strong wide graphic-novel layout that stays legible in a 2.35:1 cover.
Style/medium: final style must be american-comic, interpreted through conceptual editorial illustration. Bold ink outlines, subtle halftone texture, limited color, polished, clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover.
Color palette: ink black, paper white, muted teal, warm coral.
Visible text policy: allow only these short Chinese labels: "少写", "调试", "计划", "记录", and no more than 4 total text items. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: real IDE screenshots, fake terminal output, English slogans, complex charts, superhero poster style, dense code rain.
